"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果命中+"},{"text":"12%","color":"#ff0000"}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.c824ad3488246","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/530081.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础属性提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"基础攻击力、防御力和生命值提升"},{"text":"5%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.e7d0741f09395","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/364402.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗提升","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"效果抵抗"},{"text":"+12%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]},{"key":"0.b5b0e217a380b","isShowTitle":true,"isShowContent":true,"isShowOther":true,"filterTabKey":null,"title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_65/h_65/50364/355468/2025/4/12/357114.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"45px","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"45px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]},"content":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"伤害提升和伤害减免","bold":true}]}]}],"other":[{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"造成伤害额外提升"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":"，受到伤害额外降低"},{"text":"10%","color":"#ff0000"},{"text":""}]}]},{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]}]}]}},{"key":"0.8fb62f21e416a","type":"skill-info","data":{"title":"异格档案","isShowTabs":true,"tabs":[{"key":"0.b059cc403d5a6","label":"记忆片段Ⅰ"},{"key":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","label":"记忆片段Ⅱ"},{"key":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","label":"记忆片段Ⅲ"}],"skillList":[{"key":"0.1c98b1326610d","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.b059cc403d5a6","icon":"","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"记忆片段|"}]}]},"label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【理想主义的微光】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥波尔先生，请问，能够当选E-01异格者权益保护协会会长，您有何感想？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥波尔先生，大家都想知道，过去您是自愿从海德拉银行离职的吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥波尔先生，能说说您就任以后第一件想做的事吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥波尔先生，对于那些认为异格者权益保护协会毫无意义的人，您有什么想对他们说的吗？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"闪光灯不停闪烁着，在他的视野里留下一片片光斑，快门的响声混着记者们都发问，连成一片模糊的噪音。他被围在这光芒和噪音的正中间，举起双手向下压了压，待到噪音在他的示意下稍微降低了些时，才清了清嗓子，说道："}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「能加入能加入异格者权益保护协会，这是我毕生的荣幸。请各位相信，异格者权益保护协会绝不是什么徒有虚名的组织，而我也会竭尽所能，为每一位异格者争取权利，绝不退让。因为我们有着共同的目的—一为了更加美好的E-01。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果","iconSize":{"width":"60px","height":"60px"}},{"key":"0.ad923e74cde51","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.7fdcf39cb64dd","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【新的清晨，新的开始】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"清晨的玖拾街转运中心，站台上只有寥寥数人，随着首班列车缓缓进站。然而，看着那辆进站的列车，站台上却响起阵阵低声的议论。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「喂，这该不会是那辆光谱号吧？」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「听说那辆列车不会对异格者进行检查，我才不要坐呢……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「就是就是，万一车上出现了感染者，那个叫奥波尔的列车长，付得起这个责任吗……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在议论声中，车门打开了，奥波尔从驾驶室里走出，站在站台上。他一言不发地看着那些乘客，就像其他普通的列车长那样，等待他们上车。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"几个异格者乘客走了进去，但人类乘客还停在站台上，神情复杂地看着奥波尔。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"他回以微笑，平静地说：「请各位放心，光谱号十分安全。我一直坚信，只要有更多机会，让人类和异格者之间互相了解，那份由未知中滋生而出的隔阂就能渐渐消弭。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"站台上陷入寂静，只有时钟发出滴答声，指针缓缓走向发车的时刻。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"终于，人群里有个人再也沉不住气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不管了·…我上班就要迟到了，万一迟到就会工作不保，那样还不如杀了我！」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"那个人咬紧牙关，头也不回地冲到车上。随着他的行动，"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"又有零星的几个人类乘客，也跟着上了车。"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"},{"key":"0.021e73c84bff8","isShowIcon":false,"isShowName":false,"isShowDesc":true,"isShowMore":false,"filterTabKey":"0.ff1201a5ee3a8","iconSize":{"width":67,"height":70},"icon":"","name":"","label":"","desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【难渡己，难渡人】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「奥波尔叔叔，我不想去学校……」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"风见一宵瘪着嘴，不情不愿地用脚尖在地上画着圆。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"奥波尔无奈地蹲下，摸了摸风见一宵的头顶。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「别害怕，学校不是什么可怕的地方。在那里，你会认识更多和你年纪相近的朋友，也会学到更多有用的知识。要是有谁欺负你了，你就回来告诉叔叔，叔叔去帮你和他们讲道理。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯……我知道了，那我……我试试看。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"注视着风见一宵的背影走进教学楼，奥波尔总算长舒了一口气。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「放心吧，我会让老师们照顾好她的，不会有问题。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"一旁的康坦士校长拍了拍奥波尔的肩膀，又拍了拍自己的胸膛。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"奥波尔站起身，感激地向着康坦士点点头。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「嗯，那孩子就拜托你了。唉，我这个当家长的，还真是失职……当初当选的时候，我以为自己能够做得更好，却没想到那些反对者竟然如此不择手段……结果到头来，我连一个孩子都保护不了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「你也不容易，别给自己太大压力了。」"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"「不过，她进了学校以后，我也就放心了。等到E-01变成人类与异格者和平共存之地的那一天，我再把作为一个家人欠那孩子的部分，一点点补上吧。」"}]}]},"moreInfo":"","moreBtn":"查看升级效果"}]}},{"key":"0.1049e8819bc1f","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"推荐搭配","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"角色简评"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【战术定位】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"控制，驱散，持续伤害"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【养成建议】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"┌─────────┬────────────┐"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 技能优先级 | 515|"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"| 源器配置 | 右三主属性3效果命中 |"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"└─────────┴────────────┘"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"﻿"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"【对局表现】"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"毒队中的控制手，配合万魔打出2波控制，如果你有梨梨那么还能打出3连控制，在源网，爬塔，支线中作用巨大非常好用。pvp方面1速可驱散可控制，让对手无法动弹"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.40c2363e9c1fe","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐源器"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"12疾驰+8戍卫+6讯光天击"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.01e16842bb3ed","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐智壳"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"万魔法典"}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true},{"key":"0.607ed15092015","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"推荐攻略"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"待补充..."}]}]},"isOneLine":true,"isWapOneLine":true}],"imageSize":{"width":"160px","height":"160px"},"imagesList":[],"imageList":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_283/h_300/50364/842288/2025/7/18/859870.png"]}}],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"ijG3KckGPGg8aUQj","type":"illustrated-book","data":[],"children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]}]
